stress_explanation: Under combined_stress, the proposed policy improved reward by 38.76% on average while reducing risk by 8.61% and delay by 8.81%.
Under supplier_shock, the proposed policy improved reward by 37.64% on average while reducing risk by 8.61% and delay by 21.06%.
Under logistics_disruption, the proposed policy improved reward by 35.24% on average while reducing risk by 8.61% and delay by 15.83%.
Under demand_surge, the proposed policy improved reward by 32.66% on average while reducing risk by 8.61% and delay by 21.08%.
Under normal, the proposed policy improved reward by 26.63% on average while reducing risk by 8.61% and delay by 21.08%.
